_comment: The web/ PWA source moved to simonsangla/simon-skill-private in PR2. The Vercel project (configured with rootDirectory='web/' in the dashboard) should be relinked to simon-skill-private/web. Until then, this config skips builds on this public repo so CI doesn't report Vercel as failed. Remove this file once Vercel is disconnected from this repo OR re-pointed elsewhere.
